segments.text: Going straight for the up smash!
segments.original_text: 上スマッシュを直接打っていきました
こういった場面を見逃さないというのが

segments.text: That's exactly what Mizuno emphasized before the match
segments.original_text: まさしく試合前に水野さんがおっしゃっていた

segments.text: That whole patient defense strategy, right?
segments.original_text: 守って守ってというところですよね

full_text: Going straight for the up smash! What a crisp up smash! Not missing these key moments... That's exactly what Mizuno emphasized before the match. That whole patient defense strategy, right?
